items.definition_en: A car is a road vehicle with four wheels for driving people.
items.example_en: They drove to the city by car.

items.definition_en: A bus is a large vehicle that carries many people.
items.example_en: We took the bus to school.

items.definition_en: A train is a long vehicle that moves on rails and carries people or goods.
items.example_en: The train arrives at the station at noon.

items.definition_en: A bicycle is a vehicle with two wheels that you ride by pedaling.
items.example_en: He goes to work by bicycle every day.

items.definition_en: A motorcycle is a fast two-wheeled vehicle powered by an engine.
items.example_en: She learned how to ride a motorcycle.

items.definition_en: A plane is a flying vehicle used to travel long distances.
items.example_en: We went on holiday by plane.

items.definition_en: A tram is a vehicle that runs on tracks in a city.
items.example_en: He often takes the tram to university.

items.definition_en: A ferry is a boat that carries people or cars across water.
items.example_en: The ferry goes to the island every hour.

items.definition_en: A taxi is a car that you pay to take you somewhere.
items.example_en: He took a taxi to the airport.

items.definition_en: The subway is an underground train in a city.
items.example_en: The subway is very fast in New York.

items.definition_en: A boat is a small vehicle for traveling on water.
items.example_en: We rented a boat at the lake.

items.definition_en: A van is a medium-sized vehicle for carrying people or things.
items.example_en: The family traveled in a big van.

items.definition_en: A coach is a comfortable bus used for long trips.
items.example_en: They went to Paris by coach.

items.definition_en: A scooter is a small motor vehicle with two wheels.
items.example_en: He rides a scooter to school.

items.definition_en: A minibus is a small bus for a few people.
items.example_en: The hotel offers a free minibus to the airport.

items.definition_en: A helicopter flies using large rotating blades on top.
items.example_en: The rescue team arrived by helicopter.

items.definition_en: A pickup truck is a small truck with an open back.
items.example_en: They carried the bikes in a pickup truck.

items.definition_en: A cable car travels on a wire, often up mountains.
items.example_en: We rode a cable car up the hill.

items.definition_en: A skateboard is a small board with wheels for riding.
items.example_en: He goes to the park on his skateboard.

items.definition_en: A segway is a small electric vehicle you stand on.
items.example_en: We toured the museum on a segway.
